label: Royal aid
description: Configuration for a permit's callable aid action: targeting, pawn drops, resource drops, and orbital strike parameters.

favorCost.label: Favor cost
favorCost.description: Amount of imperial favor spent each time this permit is called. Source validation expects a positive value when royalAid is present.

points.label: Points
points.description: Raid point budget used when spawning aid pawns.

overrideAcceptableTemperatureRange.label: Override acceptable temperature range
overrideAcceptableTemperatureRange.description: Temperature range in which the aid can be called. Omit to allow any temperature.

pawnCount.label: Pawn count
pawnCount.description: Number of pawns to drop when this aid is called. Used together with pawnKindDef.

pawnKindDef.label: Pawn kind
pawnKindDef.description: PawnKindDef for the pawns dropped by this aid.

targetingRange.label: Targeting range
targetingRange.description: Maximum map distance from the calling pawn at which the aid target cell can be selected.

targetingRequireLOS.label: Targeting require LOS
targetingRequireLOS.description: If true, the calling pawn must have line of sight to the target cell. Defaults to true.

aidDurationDays.label: Aid duration days
aidDurationDays.description: Number of in-game days the aid pawns remain before departing. Used by laborer permits.

radius.label: Radius
radius.description: Radius in tiles of the orbital strike pattern. Used by orbital strike permits.

intervalTicks.label: Interval ticks
intervalTicks.description: Tick delay between successive explosions in the strike pattern. Used by orbital strike permits.

explosionCount.label: Explosion count
explosionCount.description: Number of explosions in the orbital strike sequence.

warmupTicks.label: Warmup ticks
warmupTicks.description: Ticks of warmup animation before the first explosion fires.

explosionRadiusRange.label: Explosion radius range
explosionRadiusRange.description: FloatRange for per-explosion blast radius, randomly sampled each detonation.

itemsToDrop.label: Items to drop
itemsToDrop.description: Resources dropped at the target cell. Child element names are ThingDef defNames; text is the integer count. Example: <Steel>250</Steel>.
